# Contributing to GitNexus Marketplace

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## For app submissions (listing your app)

Each category has its own `registry.json`. To list your app:

1. Fork this repo
2. Add your entry to the correct category `registry.json`
3. Follow the `CONTRIBUTING.md` inside that category folder for the exact format
4. Open a PR — a maintainer will review it manually

**Do NOT submit PRs that modify source code unless you are contributing to the marketplace frontend itself.**

## For frontend contributions (bug fixes, UI improvements)

1. Fork and clone the repo
2. `npm install` → `npm run dev`
3. Make your changes
4. Open a PR with a clear description of what changed and why

All PRs are reviewed manually. No bots.
